hero.tagline1: I combine technical expertise with thoughtful design to create intuitive, fast, and efficient web and mobile applications. My goal: to bring value to your users.

about.title: About Me
about.description: As an experienced software engineer with expertise in web and mobile development, I bring a unique blend of technical skills and creative vision to every project. My background in computer systems enables me to architect robust solutions while my design sensibility ensures exceptional user experiences. I specialize in creating innovative digital products that drive measurable business results and enhance brand visibility. I thrive in collaborative environments and am passionate about leveraging cutting-edge technologies to solve complex challenges.

services.title: My Services
services.subtitle: Specialized solutions tailored to your digital needs

webDev.title: Web Development
webDev.description: Custom web applications built with modern frameworks like React, Astro, and more. I create responsive, high-performance websites that deliver exceptional user experiences.

mobileDev.title: Mobile Development
mobileDev.description: Native and cross-platform mobile applications using React Native and Flutter. I deliver intuitive, feature-rich apps that work flawlessly across iOS and Android devices.

uiux.title: UI/UX Design
uiux.description: User-centered design that combines aesthetics with functionality. I create intuitive interfaces and seamless user experiences that engage and convert visitors.

database.title: Database & API
database.description: Robust backend solutions with PostgreSQL, MySQL, Firebase, and Supabase. I build secure, scalable APIs and database architectures that power your applications.

contact.contactDescription: Feel free to reach out to me for any questions or opportunities. I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas or opportunities to be part of your vision. If You Have Any Project In Your Mind.

contact.success: Your message has been sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.

contactCTA.title: Let's create something amazing together
contactCTA.subtitle: Ready to discuss your next project? I'm just a message away.

footer.description: Both my portfolio and a blog about programming and technology. It is a place where I share my thoughts, ideas, and experiences in the field. I hope you find it useful and informative. I am always open to feedback and suggestions, so feel free to reach out to me if you have any questions or comments.
footer.copyright: OTTY KEVIN ANSELME. All rights reserved.

timeline.title: My Journey
timeline.subtitle: My professional experience and education through the years

projects.title: Selected Projects
projects.description: Discover below some of my flagship projects created for clients over the past years. Each project demonstrates my expertise in web and mobile development.

work.title: My Portfolio
work.intro1: Welcome to my work showcase. Here you'll find a collection of projects that demonstrate my skills and experience in web development and design.
work.intro2: Each project represents a unique challenge and solution, showcasing different technologies and approaches I've worked with.

blog.pageTitle: Web & Mobile Development Blog | Kevin Otty
blog.pageDescription: Articles and tutorials on web and mobile development by Kevin Otty. Discover React, React Native, Astro.js, technical tips and real project insights.
blog.title: Insights & Ideas
blog.intro1: Welcome to my blog where I share thoughts, stories, and explorations in design, development, and the creative process.
blog.intro2: Discover articles on technical concepts, creative approaches, and industry insights to help you grow.
